churn_detection.reasoning: The transcript provides a cohesive narrative from diagnosis through current status and future outlook without any abrupt ending.

biologic_status.name: Remicade
biologic_status.reasoning: The patient states, "Started Remicade year ago."

sex.evidence: Doctor said IBS, common in older men.

years_with_crohns.evidence: Crohn's diagnosed five years ago but probably had it longer.

treatment_journey.name: Budesonide
treatment_journey.evidence: Added budesonide. Helped temporarily. But long-term steroids not option at my age

treatment_journey.name: Azathioprine
treatment_journey.evidence: Tried azathioprine. Liver didn't like it. Stopped.

treatment_journey.name: Methotrexate
treatment_journey.evidence: Methotrexate next. The fatigue was unbearable... Couldn't function.

referral_pathway.name: Doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: Doctor said IBS, common in older men.

referral_pathway.name: New doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: Changed doctors. New one said diverticulitis.

referral_pathway.name: Third doctor
referral_pathway.evidence: Finally, third doctor ordered colonoscopy. Found Crohn's throughout colon and terminal ileum.
